description_long: This object consists of two aluminum beverage cans, one upright and one lying on its side. The upright can is red with the iconic Coca-Cola branding in white, featuring a large script logo and detailed product information on the back. The can lying down is green and blue, displaying the Sprite logo with a lemon-lime graphic and water droplets, suggesting a refreshing citrus flavor. Both cans have metallic tops with pull tabs, and the cylindrical bodies are slightly reflective with a smooth, glossy finish. The cans are standard size, typical for soft drinks, and appear unopened. The overall appearance is clean, vibrant, and realistic, with clear branding and product details visible.
description: Two unopened aluminum beverage cans, one Coca-Cola (red) and one Sprite (green/blue), with clear branding and glossy surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Coca-Cola can upright with its logo and the Sprite can lying horizontally, displaying its side logo.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the Coca-Cola can's ingredients and barcode, with the Sprite can's top and partial logo visible.
description_view_2: Side view focusing on the Coca-Cola can's back text and the Sprite can's side, showing both logos and can tops.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the Coca-Cola can's side logo and the Sprite can's bottom, with less visible branding.
attribute_brand_logo: Coca-Cola logo in white script on red can (front and side), Sprite logo in white/blue/green with lemon-lime graphic on green/blue can (side).
attribute_flavor_indication: Sprite can features lemon-lime graphics and water droplets; Coca-Cola can has no explicit flavor indication.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Coca-Cola can displays ingredients and nutritional information on the back; Sprite can's details are partially visible.
